title: Monitoring Your Security Posture with Prometheus

resources.title: Kubescape Complete Guide Repository
resources.evidence_quote: the just fail is here and available via the repository on the Rawkode Academy. The link is in the description.

resources.title: Kubescape Prometheus Exporter
resources.evidence_quote: We run an operator and our cluster that uses Prometheus service monitors, speaks to Kubescape, gets a result of our scans, writes them to Prometheus

resources.title: ARMO Cloud Dashboard
resources.evidence_quote: When you run Kubescape, you get the ARMOR cloud dashboard. You can go and see the report and results of all your scans.

resources.title: Kubescape Grafana Dashboard
resources.evidence_quote: Sometimes you just need a dashboard. We need to see multiple queries, multiple metrics, and how they change together over time. So let's run the download dashboard, just target.
